bio: Emily Bohan is the founder of Bohan PT & Training, PLLC, with nearly a decade of experience as a physical therapist, personal trainer, and nutrition coach. She specializes in orthopedic injuries, hypermobility disorders (HSD, hEDS), pelvic floor therapy, and sports conditioning. Certified through Herman and Wallace and PIPER for pelvic health, she takes an integrative, whole-body approach to care.
